rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 5/10 score and raise the same core concerns: lack of SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator/deep-learning workload optimization, and GPU architecture experience. The wording differs (the variant phrases strengths around 'system architecture' and adds 'AI-agent infrastructure' framing), but these are reworded restatements of the same assessment and fall within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the Berlin→San Francisco location change — no score shift, no new location-tied concern, no geographic reasoning.
